validation_rules: non-empty; unique per cluster; matches pattern JOB-[0-9]+
one of: genomics, pkpd, molsim, general; validated against cluster config
range 1-1024; must not exceed queue limit; divisible by node CPU count
range 1-2048; proportional to CPU allocation; max 16GB per CPU
SHA256 format; must match approved image registry; Singularity/Apptainer format
must include: run_id scenario_id parameters_hash timestamp; scenario_id references approved scenarios
SHA256 of output; must match reference run within tolerance; deterministic for same input
range 1-128; matches requested CPU/node_cpu_count; validated against scheduler allocation
must reference valid scenario_id; all parameters within defined bounds; version-controlled
references registered ReFrame test class; format RF-[A-Z]+-[0-9]+; validated against suite registry
